hero.slide1_title: Ṣàbẹwò Láti Ibi Itunu Ilé Rẹ
hero.slide1_sub: Ijumọsọrọ ilera lati ibikibi, paapaa pẹlu intanẹẹti tí kò lagbara
hero.slide2_sub: Awon amoye tí wọ́n ní iwe-aṣẹ lati ran ọ lọwọ ní ede tí o ye ọ
hero.slide3_title: Asopọ Dokita ati Alaisan Latọna Jinna
hero.slide3_sub: Ibaraẹnisọrọ fidio tí o pe lori ẹrọ kankan

features_section.title: A Ṣe E Fun Rọrun Ni Nigeria
features_section.subtitle: UbiMD n pese ijumọsọrọ ilera latọna jijin ti o dan, ti o daabobo ati ti o yara
features_section.card1_desc: Ibaraẹnisọrọ oju-si-oju tí o ṣiṣẹ daradara lori intanẹẹti 2G/3G ati foonu atijọ.
features_section.card2_desc: A máa so ọ pọ mọ dokita ti o dara julọ da lori ami aisan rẹ ati ede ti o fẹ.
features_section.card3_desc: Gbe fọto oogun rẹ sori ẹrọ, a ó sọ iru oogun naa ati bi a ṣe nlo o.
features_section.card4_desc: Gba idahun iyara lori awọn ibeere ilera lai dákọọlẹ.
features_section.card5_desc: Gbogbo dokita lori UbiMD ni iwe-aṣẹ lati ṣiṣẹ ni Nigeria.
features_section.card6_desc: UbiMD n ṣiṣẹ lori gbogbo foonu ati ẹrọ kankan.

stats.title: Syeed Ilera Tó Ṣegbe
stats.sub: Nṣiṣẹ fun awọn dokita ati alaisan kaakiri Nigeria

how_it_works_section.title: Bẹrẹ Pẹlu UbiMD Loni
how_it_works_section.sub: Gba iranlowo ilera ni igbesẹ mẹrin ti o rọọrun
how_it_works_section.step1_desc: Ṣẹda iroyin ọfẹ pẹlu imeeli rẹ tabi nọmba foonu.
how_it_works_section.step2_desc: Ṣalaye iṣoro ilera rẹ ni ọna ti o rọọrun lati ba dokita ti o tọ pade.
how_it_works_section.step3_desc: A ó so ọ pọ mọ dokita tí o ba ede ati ibeere rẹ mu.
how_it_works_section.step4_desc: Bẹrẹ fidio tabi ọrọ lẹsẹkẹsẹ ki o gba imọran to pe.

testimonials_section.title: Awon eniyan kaakiri Nigeria n lo o
testimonials_section.sub: Ka ohun tí awọn olumulo sọ nipa UbiMD
testimonials_section.t1_text: UbiMD ran mi lọwọ lati ri dokita lai rin irin ajo gigun. A ba mi sọrọ ni Yoruba ati o rọọrun gidi.
testimonials_section.t2_text: Gẹgẹ bí dokita, UbiMD n jẹ ki n de ọdọ awọn alaisan ni ibi tí o jina.
testimonials_section.t3_text: Mo feran botini WhatsApp pupọ. O yara, rọrun ati o munadoko.
testimonials_section.t4_text: Mo ri dokita ti nsọrọ Hausa laisi kuro ni ile. O rọọrun gan-an.
testimonials_section.rating_text: Ti ṣe ayẹwo irawọ 5 nipasẹ ẹgbẹẹgbẹẹ awọn olumulo ti o ni itẹlọrun kọja Naijiria

cta_section.title: Kọkọ Gba Iriri UbiMD
cta_section.sub: Ilera latọna jijin fun awọn ara Nigeria

early_access_section.banner: Awon eniyan 500+ ti darapọ mọ tẹlẹ
early_access_section.title: Forukọsilẹ Bayi
early_access_section.sub: Darapọ mọ awọn ara Nigeria tí o n reti iraye ilera to dara
early_access_section.select_label: Bawo ni o ti gbọ nipa wa?
